headline: SBA Stock Just Had a Big Day. Why It’s Suddenly Hot.
summary: The company told Barron’s it isn’t commenting at this time on a report that said it is considering a sale.

headline: American Tower Corporation (AMT) Traded Lower Despite Strong Results
summary: Baron Capital, an investment management company, released its Q4 2025 letter for its “Baron Real Estate Income Fund”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. In 2025, the Fund appreciated 3.74% (Institutional Shares), exceeding the 1.68% gain for the MSCI US REIT Index (the REIT Index). In Q4 2025, the Fund declined modestly by 0.40%, […]
